testimonials.author: Sissi Antonini
testimonials.text: Just an awesome experience from start to finish! Management and staff are top notch! Special thanks to David Colin & Gator for ALL your help!

testimonials.author: Wendy Johnson
testimonials.text: I live in Sugar Mill Woods. Your construction services are doing work on Pagoda Court East. I want to say this is the first time I have ever seen a crew so careful about cleaning up on the site! The concrete manager is a super nice guy. Again, thank you for making our community look nice!

links.text: Get Your Free Quote / View All Services / All Projects (body CTAs)

bodyText: Building Florida's Strongest Foundations. Slabs, Shells & Concrete Work Done Rite. From slabs and block walls to full shell packages and large-scale concrete projects, DunRite Construction is the trusted partner for Florida's leading builders, developers, and homeowners. With decades of hands-on experience and over $15M in projects annually, we deliver quality you can see and strength you can count on. ABOUT US — Crafting Shells, Concrete & Communities That Last. DunRite Construction has grown from a small family concrete crew into one of Florida's most trusted shell contractors. Our team pours, frames, and builds the critical structures that developers, builders, and homeowners rely on. From neighborhood-wide sidewalks to three-story beach homes, we bring precision, efficiency, and pride to every job. Our Mission: To build with integrity, craftsmanship, and efficiency while honoring our family legacy in concrete. Our Vision: To be Florida's most reliable shell and concrete partner, known for quality, relationships, and hard work. Over 650 Projects Completed. $15M+ in Annual Projects. 99% Referral-Based Business. Concrete & Shell Work Built to Last — From foundations to framing, every phase of our work is handled with precision, efficiency, and pride. We bring decades of experience and a family legacy in concrete to deliver projects on time, on budget, and done right. We're dedicated to building your foundation the Rite way. OUR SERVICES — Florida Shell & Concrete Services: turnkey shell packages and concrete services that help developers, builders, and homeowners save time, control costs, and trust the job will be done right. OUR PORTFOLIO — Recent Work & Signature Projects: from drag strips and malls to lagoon communities and multi-home developments. TESTIMONIALS — Trusted by Builders, Developers & Homeowners. DunRite Construction is a Florida-based shell and concrete contractor with over 25 years of experience. DunRite Construction Group, LLC ©2026. All Rights Reserved.
